title: CF_DocCentralV3_CreateDocument — Response Schema
description: Output returned by CF_DocCentralV3_CreateDocument to the Canvas App. Always returns a structured response. The Canvas App must check success before displaying confirmation.

oneOf.title: Full success response
oneOf.description: Document created, all file(s) uploaded, permissions assigned, reserved number deleted (if applicable).

itemId.description: SharePoint item ID from Svi predmeti for the newly created document.

delovodniBroj.description: Assigned registry number. Display to user.

oneOf.title: Partial success — permission assignment failed
oneOf.description: Document and files created successfully. Permission assignment failed (non-fatal). Document exists but access may be restricted to service account only until repaired.

message.const: Dokument je zaveden ali dodela prava nije uspela. Kontaktirajte administratora.

oneOf.title: Failure response
oneOf.description: Document was NOT created. No Svi predmeti item exists (or if creation failed mid-flow, see rollback-and-compensation.md for partial state). The Canvas App must inform the user and allow retry.

examples: Rezervisani broj nije validan ili je već iskorišćen.
Dokument nije zaveden. Proverite audit log za detalje.

examples.message: Dokument je zaveden ali dodela prava nije uspela. Kontaktirajte administratora.
Dokument nije zaveden. Proverite audit log za detalje.

canvasAppGuidance.description: How the Canvas App must handle each response variant.
rules: Check success field first. Display delovodniBroj and itemId on success.
If success = true and errorCode = 'PERMISSION_ASSIGNMENT_FAILED': show a yellow warning banner — document was created but access setup failed.
If success = false: show a red error banner with the message. Allow the user to retry.
Always store the returned correlationId for reference — useful if the user needs to contact an admin.
On VALIDATION_FAILED: highlight the missing field in the form rather than showing a generic error.
On REGISTRY_YEAR_CLOSED: show a message that document registration is closed for the current year and the user cannot proceed.
Do NOT retry automatically — allow the user to decide whether to retry.

powerAutomateOutputDefinition.description: Output parameters to define in the Respond to a PowerApp or flow action.
